'''鈭歫-zh-y-m''' ('''kajazhyemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrophoresize|electrophoresize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-y-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrophoresize|electrophoresize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-zh-y-m
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhyemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhyemoko|thijazhyemoko]] || [[word:jijazhyemoko|jijazhyemoko]] || [[word:shijazhyemoko|shijazhyemoko]] || [[word:kijazhyemoko|kijazhyemoko]]
